subject: Error creating new species with M/Warp1.1.0-beta
body:
Hello all,

I have been encountering an error when creating a new species in M from 
Warp v1.1.0-beta1. 

M crashes during the training denoising step 4/5 when creating a new 
species. I've attached a screenshot of the error and corresponding 
lastcrash.txt -- it seems to reference denied access to a d_mask.mrc file. 
Any ideas what this could be?

M/Warp v1.0.9 seems to be working fine with our current set up. 

Thanks in advance!
Josh

11/15/2022 11:20:25 PM:
System.UnauthorizedAccessException: Access to the path 'D:\Program Files\Warp\1.1.0-beta1\d_mask.mrc' is denied.
